query:
SELECT rp.plan_id, rp.team_id, rp.created_at, rp.first_released_at, rp.last_released_at, rp.archived_at,
       rpd.dog_id, dr.status, dr.updated_at
FROM release_plans rp
LEFT JOIN release_plan_dogs rpd ON rp.plan_id = rpd.plan_id
LEFT JOIN dog_records dr ON rpd.dog_id = dr.dog_id;
